data.title: Einride achieves world-first cabless electric autonomous border crossing from Sweden to Norway, delivering goods for PostNord.
data.description: Einride recently achieved a significant milestone by autonomously transporting goods from Sweden to Norway for PostNord. This groundbreaking feat is the first ever cabless electric autonomous border-crossing globally. The delivery was part of the MODI project, funded by the EU, which focuses on facilitating the safe implementation of autonomous vehicle technology. The successful demonstration highlights the potential for innovative autonomous transport solutions in the future.

data.title: Vialto Partners appoints five senior executives to drive global expansion, enhance operations across North America and Europe.
data.description: Global work, tax, and immigration solutions company Vialto Partners has appointed five senior executives to enhance its global C-suite team. This move aims to boost innovation, improve operations in North America and Europe, and expedite the company's international growth. With extensive experience in various industries, these executives bring valuable expertise that will help Vialto provide efficient global workforce mobility solutions.

data.title: Trader multiplied $6.8K to $1.5M using risky strategy on a perpetuals exchange, leveraging maker rebates and precision.
data.description: Through the utilization of a bot on a perpetuals exchange, a trader managed to grow $6,800 to an impressive $1.5 million. This remarkable feat was achieved by taking advantage of maker rebates and displaying an exceptional level of microstructure precision in their trading strategies.

data.title: Zinzino acquires Truvy to boost distribution in North America, Latin America, South Korea. Acquisition finalized on Sept. 25, 2025.
data.description: In Gothenburg, Sweden, on September 25, 2025, Zinzino revealed its intention to purchase the North American direct sales company, Truvy, in a press release dated September 5, 2025. The acquisition process has been finalized by Zinzino, granting them ownership of Truvy's rights and operations. No specific financial details were provided regarding the acquisition.

data.title: Solana price at $204 tests support despite CME boost; indicators mixed. Institutional adoption grows with CME launch.
data.description: Solana is currently trading at $204.31, marking a decrease of 2.69%. Technical indicators are signaling mixed patterns amidst a rise in institutional adoption, particularly with the imminent launch of CME futures.

data.title: XRP price hovers near $2.85, with 43 RSI and bearish MACD signals, above $2.54 200-day moving average support.
data.description: The cryptocurrency XRP is currently trading at $2.85 amidst bearish MACD signals and a Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 43. Despite this, XRP is holding above its 200-day moving average support level of $2.54.

data.title: Pollo AI debuts Vidu Q2 and Kling 2.5 Turbo AI video models in Singapore, enabling creators with studio-level cinematics.
data.description: In Singapore on September 25, 2025, Pollo AI launched two cutting-edge AI video models, Vidu Q2 and Kling 2.5 Turbo. These models aim to streamline cinematic production processes by providing advanced features. Notably, Kling AI 2.5 Turbo empowers content creators to accurately capture nuanced facial expressions, enhancing the quality of videos. This innovation is set to revolutionize the industry by offering efficiency and improved output.

data.title: Scania presents new sustainable solutions at Busworld: focus on electric vehicles, Super powertrain, plug-in hybrid variant.
data.description: In SÖDERTÄLJE, Sweden on September 25, 2025, attendees at the Scania booth will encounter a company fully committed to environmentally-friendly and affordable passenger transportation. They will showcase their latest electric models alongside the innovative Super powertrain platform and a new plug-in hybrid option.

data.title: Despite a 2.67% drop, Binance Coin trades at $989.25, facing pressure despite a strong bullish trend. Key support is at $849.
data.description: The price of Binance Coin is currently at $989.25, experiencing a 2.67% decrease in value for the day. This decline has led to the coin testing important support levels, although it is still displaying a robust bullish trend.

data.title: iScreen now fully compatible with iOS 26. No.1 in Graphic Design in US & worldwide. Announced by Xiamen iScreen, Sept. 25, 2025.
data.description: A mobile personalization app, iScreen, by Xiamen iScreen Information Technology Co., Ltd., has achieved the top position in Graphic Design in both the U.S. and across the globe. The announcement was made in Los Angeles on September 25, 2025. This flagship app now fully supports Apple's newest mobile platform.
